title: Availability Integration
summary:
Availability integration is already complete in review_manager.py. All requirements met:

1. ✅ Import availability_checker at top (lines 15-16)
2. ✅ Availability check in initiate_review() function (lines 46-56)
3. ✅ Helper function check_availability() (lines 31-42)
4. ✅ --force flag to bypass check (line 242, argument parsing)

The implementation:
- Checks availability before initiating review (unless --force used)
- Returns structured JSON with deferred status and next_window when unavailable
- Fails open if availability checker errors
- Preserves all existing review flow functionality

verification.results: All commands executed successfully. Availability check working, force flag bypasses check as expected.

technical_notes.implementation_found: The availability integration was already implemented in review_manager.py exactly matching the specifications in the brief.
key_features: Structured response with deferred status when unavailable
Force flag to bypass availability check
Integration with next_available_window() for better UX
